{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Jai clan member
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Soulsmith (novel)|Soulsmith]]
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Jai clan member]] with [[steel]] in his iron hair is present.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
